data.body:
42d1 DONE + PUSHED. Held-out TDD: impl subagent saw only 2 happy-path tests; full held-out oracle 9/9 GREEN (fail-open absent, located-error malformed, env-not-pinned fails, KEYID-SPOOF with foreign sig fails [core security property], era rotation flows through). Mutation-checked: env_id-filter removal -> not-pinned RED; swallow-malformed -> located-error RED; restore GREEN. Pre-flight: lint+typecheck PASS, config+attest regression subset 96 PASS. Committed eae115da3 (urban-dihydric-trogon) + pushed -> CHANGE 650 stacked on 649. Full make test running (bk1uhybdx).
GERRIT STATUS: 649 (368c) LLM-Review +1, Verified pending. 650 (42d1) no votes yet.
STACK: 649 (368c) <- 650 (42d1). Next: 4214 merge-gate CI (extends verify-identity.yaml; invokes 42d1 verify_required_environment). Will close 368c/42d1 tickets after their Verified +1.
